title: Options 3
description: Option has many useful methods like `unwrap_or`, `map`, and `and_then` for working with optional values.
instructions: Use Option methods to provide default values and transform optional data.
hints: When you match on `y`, ownership of the Point moves. Use `&y` or `ref` to borrow instead.
`unwrap_or(default)` returns the contained value or a provided default.
Match on a reference: `match &y { Some(p) => ..., None => ... }`
explanation: Matching on a reference (`&y` instead of `y`) prevents the value from being moved, so you can still use it afterwards. `unwrap_or(default)` is a safe way to extract the value from an Option with a fallback. Other useful methods include `unwrap_or_else` (lazy default), `map` (transform the inner value), and `and_then` (chain operations).
